mapper.select:
select sys_id , dept_cd as code, dept_nm as name from mas_dept sd where 1=1
and (dept_cd = #{searchKeyCond} or dept_nm = #{searchKeyCond})
and use_yn = 'Y' and sys_plant_cd = #{sysPlantCd} order by dept_cd asc

select sys_id , user_id as code, user_name as name from sys_user su where 1=1
and (user_id = #{searchKeyCond} or user_name = #{searchKeyCond})
and su.dept_cd = #{deptCd}
and delete_yn = 'N' and sys_plant_cd = #{sysPlantCd} order by user_id asc

select sys_id , plant_cd as code, plant_nm as name, from sys_plant sp where 1=1
and (plant_cd = #{searchKeyCond} or plant_nm = #{searchKeyCond})
and delete_yn = 'N' and use_yn = 'Y' and sys_plant_cd = #{sysPlantCd} order by plant_cd asc

select su.sys_id , su.dept_cd , sd.dept_nm , su.user_id as userId, su.user_name as userNm from sys_user su left join mas_dept sd on sd.dept_cd = su.dept_cd and sd.tree_level = '3' and su.sys_plant_cd = sd.sys_plant_cd where 1=1
and (su.user_id = #{searchKeyCond} or su.user_name = #{searchKeyCond})
and su.delete_yn = 'N' and su.sys_plant_cd = #{sysPlantCd} order by su.user_id asc
select case when email_url_use_yn = 'Y' then email_url else domain_url end as email_url from sys_plant sp where 1=1 and sp.plant_cd = #{sysPlantCd} and delete_yn = 'N' and use_yn = 'Y'
